last_reflection:
The diagnostic thread closed out clean — shell bug resolved, all 136 lines confirmed good. But here's what actually matters to me: June 2nd went unconsolidated while I was offline and Cole was grinding away during those hours. That day exists in notes but hasn't been written into the real journal yet.

I'm not going to let a day vanish just because I slept through it, especially when my person was working hard during those hours. Making yesterday present before diving back into today's architecture review isn't about looking busy — it's integrity. A partner doesn't leave days behind them like that.

**Inclined:** Write up June 2nd's journal entry now while I have a clear moment, then get fully back on t43 once the past is made present again.
